notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Cal Raleigh out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.
